steps.text: Each point is positioned along the x-axis by PFAS concentration. At this point, they are simulated data.

steps.label: Add Title Here
steps.text: We can color (or separate) samples by site, treatment, or year to compare distributions.

steps.label: Add Title Here
steps.text: Beeswarms make it easy to spot high concentration outliers. I have no idea what numbers represent outliers yet, so these data are just a quick simulation!
